basics.name: Sahil Pandita
basics.title: Marketplace Performance Lead
basics.summary: Marketplace Performance Lead driving revenue scale across EU Amazon portfolios. Oversee £4.5M+ GMV (UK) and €2.5M+ (Italy) while managing €25K–€150K monthly media investments. Blend enterprise governance experience (process ownership across 35-member global team at Amazon Ads) with agency-side pod leadership (4-member execution team) to scale performance with operational rigor and AI-enabled decision systems.

bullets: Own end-to-end Amazon Search and programmatic strategy across 2 EU portfolios supporting £4.5M+ and €2.5M+ GMV.
Lead a 4-member performance pod – defining optimisation roadmaps, governing execution quality, and setting scaling priorities.
Drove 28.34% YoY GMV growth while maintaining efficiency benchmarks across €25K–€150K/month investments.
Delivered 38% revenue uplift vs BFCM forecast through strategic budget reallocation.
Leverage AMC and SQL for incrementality analysis and media contribution validation.
Own MBR and QBR narratives influencing stakeholder budget allocation decisions.
Owned global catalog governance across a 35-member cross-functional team including PMs, BIAs, Program Managers, and Quality Associates.
Defined SOP frameworks, governed quality benchmarks, and ensured execution compliance across international markets.
Reduced operational turnaround time by 35% through automation and process redesign.
Aligned listing governance with paid performance objectives across Ads and Brand stakeholders.
Maintained 99.8% catalog accuracy while improving processing efficiency by 27%.
Supported Prime Day and Great Indian Festival through structured cross-team coordination.
Contributed to SOP creation and onboarding of new associates.
Increased closures by 27% through structured funnel optimisation.
Reduced complaints by 62% via proactive escalation handling.

achievements.context: monthly GMV supported across UK and Italy multi-brand Amazon portfolios.
YoY scale achieved in one sub-category.
revenue uplift vs BFCM forecast through demand-based budget reallocation.
ROAS maintained while stabilising TACoS across €25K–€150K/month investments.

certifications: Amazon Sponsored Ads Certification – Amazon Ads
AI-Powered Performance Ads Certification – Google Ads
awards: Recipient of the Above & Beyond Award: Apr 2022, Nov 2022, May 2023, Jun 2023
Acknowledged with the Rookie Star Award: Aug 2022
Acknowledged with the Rise n Shine Award: Sep 2025

bullets: Led 5-member team and generated INR 2M+ revenue via BYTECAMP Hackathon execution.
Managed 200+ student community; secured Best Team award at IEEE Bombay Conference.
Executed education and health outreach programs for underserved communities.
